summary: Bug fix verified: GET /api/child/quests-new now properly filters quests. Children only see: (1) Admin quests for their grade range, (2) Teacher quests from classrooms they're enrolled in, (3) Parent chores assigned specifically to them. All 11 tests passed.
passed_tests: ✅ Aashi (Grade 3) sees admin quests for her grade range
✅ Aashi sees teacher quests only from her enrolled classrooms
✅ Aashi sees parent chores assigned specifically to her (child_id match)
✅ Isolated user (no parent links) sees 0 parent chores
✅ Isolated user (no classroom enrollment) sees 0 teacher quests
✅ Isolated user still sees grade-appropriate admin quests
✅ Aashi does NOT see chores assigned to other children
✅ Expired quests are marked correctly with is_expired flag
✅ Data isolation verified between different children

verified_bug_fix.original_bug: Children were seeing quests and chores from other parents/teachers not linked to them
verified_bug_fix.root_cause: Query used 'is_active: True' which returned ALL active quests without proper filtering

fix_applied.admin_quests: Filtered by min_grade/max_grade matching child's grade
fix_applied.teacher_quests: Filtered by classroom_id in child's enrolled classrooms (via classroom_students collection)
fix_applied.parent_chores: Filtered by child_id matching the current user

positive_cases: Child with parent link sees parent's chores assigned to them
Child enrolled in classroom sees teacher quests from that classroom
All children see grade-appropriate admin quests
negative_cases: Child without parent links sees NO parent chores
Child without classroom enrollment sees NO teacher quests
Child does NOT see chores assigned to other children
Child does NOT see teacher quests from other classrooms

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly uses $or conditions to build proper filter query
Lookups to classroom_students and parent_child_links collections work correctly
Grade filtering for admin quests handles null/missing min_grade/max_grade
Source filter parameter properly combines with main filter using $and
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_child_quests_filtering.py - Created comprehensive test suite for bug fix verification
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test chores and teacher quests to verify filtering, then cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for GET /api/child/quests-new verified. The endpoint now properly filters quests based on: (1) Admin quests by grade range, (2) Teacher quests by classroom enrollment, (3) Parent chores by child_id. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_child_quests_filtering.py for regression testing. Test users: Aashi M (user_cd3928036bf4) has parent + classroom, Test Expired Quest User (test_expired_quest_user_1769709169743) has no parent/classroom links.
